overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player descends through a neon-lit underpass, emerges into a bright sunlit intersection, and explores streets lined with towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

events.description: descending stairs from covered walkway into darker underpass area
entering fully artificial neon-lit corridor with blue and red arcade lights

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a dimly lit underground corridor lined with neon signs, vending machines, and arcade games

entered.detail: green painted building with wooden window frames and external air conditioning units
large blue and pink neon arrow sign pointing downward attached to wall
yellow sign with black text reading PAWN above shop entrance
illuminated vending machine with glowing advertisements on the side
row of glowing arcade game machines with blue and red neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered walkway with green building facades, then descends stairs into a dark neon-lit underpass. The environment transitions from natural daylight to artificial neon illumination with arcade machines and vending machines lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: bright urban intersection with steam vents and towering mixed-era buildings

events.description: exiting dark underpass into bright sunlight of open urban intersection
turning right to observe surrounding buildings and cityscape
waiting at corner as blue sedan drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass and looking around the bright intersection, observing the towering buildings and neon billboards before proceeding along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving through the intersection
person standing on sidewalk taking photos of the cityscape with camera raised

entered.detail: large blue electrical utility box with yellow warning symbols and text
steam rising from ground vent in the middle of the street
tall red building with multiple balconies and external air conditioning units
restaurant sign with neon chef logo and chopsticks
dense network of black power cables crisscrossing above the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark underpass into a bright sunlit intersection. A blue utility box and steam vent are prominent in the foreground, while a tall red apartment building rises on the left. The camera turns to explore the area, revealing dense overhead power lines and a blue sedan driving through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with storefronts and overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: turning left onto main sidewalk following the pedestrian flow
crossing side street while avoiding oncoming pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians, moving deeper into the commercial district with dense neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and red shorts crossing the street ahead of the camera
blue SUV parked along the curb with hazard lights flashing

entered.detail: green street sign reading Forbes mounted on building corner
cluster of red vending machines under building overhang
red elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with metal railings
purple neon sign with Japanese characters and Tengu mask logo
vertical HOTEL sign with red neon letters and striped awning

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy commercial sidewalk, the camera passes a green Forbes street sign and red vending machines. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead, while neon signs including a prominent Tengu logo illuminate the storefronts. The hotel signage becomes visible on the left as pedestrians move in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial thoroughfare with massive billboards and distant megatowers

events.description: crossing main intersection with crosswalk lines visible
ascending ramp on sidewalk to elevated walkway level
moving from street level to elevated position with expansive view of distant towers

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and ascending a ramp, with expansive views of the distant megatowers and dense urban skyline becoming visible

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt crossing the street in the opposite direction
silver car driving down the main road away from camera

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard advertising FERVID with images of perfume bottles and figures
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging across the street on wires
massive futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon facades in the distance
multi-story building with prominent HOTEL signage and green facade
orange metal railing along the ascending sidewalk ramp

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide intersection beneath strings of red lanterns, with a large FERVID billboard dominating the view. After crossing, the path ascends a ramp with orange railings, revealing expansive views of distant megatowers with massive holographic displays. The environment transitions from street level to an elevated perspective of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban walkway through a dark subterranean passage and into a vibrant, sunlit commercial district. It begins among green building facades before descending stairs into a dim underpass where natural light is replaced by the artificial glow of neon signs, arcade machines, and vending machines. As the camera emerges from the darkness, the scene opens into a bright intersection featuring a blue utility box and a towering red apartment building under a web of overhead power lines. The movement then shifts toward a busy commercial sidewalk, passing a green Forbes street sign and red vending machines as the lighting blends sunlight with glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera advances under a pedestrian bridge toward a hotel and a prominent Tengu logo while moving alongside a flow of pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a crowded street-level intersection to an elevated vantage point overlooking a futuristic cityscape. It begins by crossing a wide road beneath strings of red lanterns, with a large FERVID billboard dominating the immediate view. As the camera moves forward, the path ascends a ramp lined with orange railings, shifting the perspective upward. The scene then opens up to reveal an expansive vista of distant megatowers adorned with massive holographic displays, completing the transition from the enclosed urban street to a sweeping aerial view of the cyberpunk metropolis.
